stories.title: Curry Takes Major Step — 5-on-5 Scrimmage Raises Return Hope

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
STEPH CURRY participated in a live 5-on-5 scrimmage today.

26 games missed. First time cleared for full contact since January 30.

Sunday vs. Houston is reportedly on the table. The Warriors' Play-In fate just got interesting.

#HoopHeroes #Warriors #NBA

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Draymond Green: "There's no shutdown coming for Steph at the moment. He wants to play."

After 26 straight games missed, Curry practiced live today. Warriors (36-39) are holding the last Play-In spot by a thread.

The timing is everything.

#HoopHeroes #Warriors #StephCurry

article.headline: Curry Participates in 5-on-5 Scrimmage — Return Sunday vs. Houston Reportedly on the Table

stories.title: Thunder Hit 60 Wins — SGA's Scoring Streak Extends to 128+ Games

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
OKC just hit 60 WINS for the second straight season.

SGA: 128+ consecutive 20-point games. 47 pts in OT vs. Detroit last game.

The Thunder are building something that doesn't happen very often. Take notice.

#HoopHeroes #Thunder #SGA

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
SGA's 128-game scoring streak is the most underappreciated record in sports.

Every. Single. Night. 20+ points.

And yet the MVP race is still a debate. He's at 31.6 PPG on 55% shooting. Let him cook.

#HoopHeroes #SGA #MVP

article.headline: Thunder Hit 60 Wins Again — SGA's NBA-Record Scoring Streak Reaches 128-Plus Games

stories.title: Wolves Fall in OT to Suns 110-107 — Edwards Goes Off for 29 Despite Loss

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Anthony Edwards scored 29 points on a MINUTES RESTRICTION coming off a knee injury.

The Wolves still lost 110-107 in OT. Booker hit the winner.

Imagine what ANT looks like at full strength. The Wolves need him NOW.

#HoopHeroes #Timberwolves #NBA

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
The West 5th seed is now a coin flip.

MIN leads HOU by just half a game after the OT loss to Phoenix last night.

Edwards needs to play every remaining game for awards eligibility. High stakes ball the rest of the way.

#HoopHeroes #Timberwolves #NBAPlayoffs

article.headline: Edwards Scores 29 on a Minutes Restriction — But Late Turnovers, Booker's Winner Sink Wolves in OT

stories.title: Pistons Clinch Central Division — NBA's Greatest Turnaround Story Continues

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Two years ago, the Detroit Pistons went 14-68.

Today, they clinched the Central Division title at 55-21.

Without Cade Cunningham (collapsed lung). No. 1 seed in the East within reach.

This is the NBA's greatest turnaround story — full stop.

#HoopHeroes #Pistons #NBA

article.headline: From 14-68 to Division Champions: Pistons Clinch Central Title in NBA's Greatest Turnaround

stories.title: Jokic's Triple-Double Season — 31 Instances, Closing in on History

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Nikola Jokic has 31 triple-double games this season.

Since returning March 18: 26.2 pts / 13.4 reb / 9.9 ast.

He's the most statistically complete player in NBA history — and he barely gets talked about in the MVP race.

#HoopHeroes #Nuggets #Jokic

stories.title: LeBron-Bronny Viral Backboard Story Confirmed by LeBron

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Bronny told reporters LeBron shattered a backboard dunking in 2014.

LeBron confirmed it: "I didn't mean to shatter the glass, but yeah, I shattered it."

Bryce's Arizona team just reached the Final Four. The James family is having a WEEKEND.

#HoopHeroes #Lakers #LeBron

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
West Play-In standings (April 1):

7. Phoenix
8. LA Clippers (39-37)
9. Portland (39-38)
10. Golden State (36-39)

Steph Curry could return Sunday. 7 games left. This is going to be chaos.

#HoopHeroes #NBA #NBAPlayoffs
